data.title: Par Pacific Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Schedule
data.description: Houston based company Par Pacific Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PARR) will unveil its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 5, 2026, after the New York Stock Exchange trading hours. Investors can join a conference call on May 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. CT (10:00 a.m. ET). The detailed report will be accessible on Par Pacific’s website.

data.title: Lamar Advertising Company to Release First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026 Operating Results
data.description: Baton Rouge-based Lamar Advertising Company (Nasdaq: LAMR) is set to announce its earnings report for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026, on Thursday, May 7, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call is scheduled to take place on the same day at 8:00 a.m. (Central Time) for discussions regarding the company’s performance and to address any queries related to its operations. This event will give investors and stakeholders insights into Lamar's financial standing and strategic outlook moving forward.

data.title: AGF Investments Welcomes John Porter as Chief Investment Officer
data.description: In Toronto on April 13, 2026, AGF Investments Inc. disclosed the selection of John Porter as the Chief Investment Officer (CIO), commencing his role on May 1, 2026. With the trading symbol TSX:AGF.B, AGF Investments made this announcement. Mr. Porter, appointed to the position, has an abundance of experience in investment management and leadership spanning numerous years across global markets and asset types. His proficiencies include a profound understanding of portfolio management and a rich background in retail and institutional asset management.

data.title: Copa Holdings Announces Monthly Traffic Statistics for March 2026
data.description: In Panama City on April 13, 2026, Copa Holdings, S.A. (NYSE: CPA) disclosed its preliminary passenger traffic figures for March 2026.

data.title: Mastercard Incorporated to Host Conference Call on First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Mastercard, a global payment technology company, is scheduled to announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on April 30, 2026. This marks a significant event for the company as investors and stakeholders eagerly anticipate the performance metrics for the beginning of the year. The release of these numbers will provide insights into Mastercard's revenue, profits, and overall financial health, shaping market perceptions and potentially influencing stock prices. Stay tuned for an in-depth analysis of Mastercard's Q1 2026 results.

data.title: Jack in the Box Inc. Advances Board Refreshment with Appointment of Eduardo Luz
data.description: In San Diego, Jack in the Box Inc. (NASDAQ: JACK) welcomed Eduardo Luz as an independent director on its Board of Directors. David Goebel and Madeleine Kleiner will be retiring from the Board on May 8, 2026. This move will bring the Board's size down to nine members. The inclusion of Mr. Luz is in line with the company's commitment to having a top-notch Board.

data.title: WD to Announce Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ: WDC) intends to reveal its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026 on April 30, 2026, after market hours. A conference call for investors is scheduled for the same day at 1:30 p.m. Pacific / 4:30 p.m. Eastern time to discuss these outcomes. Interested parties can access a live audio webcast and a replay of the call at investor.wdc.com. WD, or Western Dig, is the company behind this announcement.

data.title: Astronics Launches Qi2 Wireless Charging Module, Delivering Future-Proof Technology for Modern Aircraft Cabins
data.description: A new product called the Qi2 Wireless Charging Module has been introduced by Astronics Corporation. It is designed for modern aircraft cabins and provides future-proof technology. Astronics Corporation, listed on Nasdaq as ATRO, is based in East Aurora, New York.

data.title: Universal Display Corporation Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Ewing, New Jersey - Universal Display Corporation will be announcing their first quarter financial results for 2026 on April 30th. They are scheduled to host an earnings call at 5 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results. This information was released through a Business Wire press release.

data.title: UL Solutions Inc. Broadens Portfolio with Agreement to Acquire Eurofins Scientific's Electrical & Electronics Business1
data.description: Northbrook, Illinois-based UL Solutions Inc. (NYSE: ULS), a prominent player in applied safety science worldwide, revealed its conclusive decision to purchase the electrical and electronics (E&E) arm, encompassing the MET Labs certification mark, of Eurofins Scientific SE. This acquisition is aimed at broadening UL Solutions' worldwide presence and bolstering its testing, inspection, and certification (TIC) operations related to electrical safety and connected items.

data.title: Hims & Hers to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 11, 2026
data.description: In San Francisco, Hims & Hers Health, Inc. (NYSE: HIMS), a prominent health and wellness platform, revealed that it is set to disclose its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 after the market ends on Monday, May 11, 2026. A live conference call will be conducted to delve into these results at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day. Interested individuals can join the conference call by dialing (888) 510-2630 for U.S. participants and (646) 960-0137 for international participants.

data.title: Infinity Natural Resources Appoints Scott McNeill to Board of Directors
data.description: Infinity Natural Resources, Inc. (NYSE: INR) based in Morgantown, W. Va., has appointed Scott McNeill to its Board of Directors. Effective immediately, Mr. McNeill joins the company bringing with him over 20 years of experience in energy investment banking, capital markets, and executive roles in public and private energy firms. Throughout his career, he has held positions as CEO, CFO, and board member, contributing significantly to the growth and financing of various energy companies.

data.title: Bloomin’ Brands, Inc. to Host Fiscal 2026 First Quarter Earnings Conference Call at 8:00 AM EDT on May 6, 2026
data.description: Bloomin’ Brands, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLMN) is set to announce its fiscal first quarter results for the period ending March 29, 2026. The report will be made public on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, around 6:30 AM EDT, followed by a conference call to discuss the financial outcomes at 8:00 AM EDT on the same day. Interested individuals can tune into the live webcast of the call on the Company’s website at http://www.bloominbrands.com in the Investors section. A replay of the webcast will also be accessible on the website following the conclusion of the call.

data.title: Nu Skin Enterprises to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Utah-based Nu Skin Enterprises, Inc. (NYSE: NUS) is set to unveil its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 7 after the market closes. Following this, the company's management will conduct a conference call at 5 p.m. ET on the same day with investors. This call will cover recent performance highlights and future business strategies. Interested parties can access the webcast of the conference call, which will include the financial data shared during the discussion.

data.title: Royal Gold to Participate in the Renmark Financial Communications Virtual Non-Deal Roadshow Series on Tuesday, April 21, 2026
data.description: Royal Gold has announced its participation in the Renmark Financial Communications Virtual Non-Deal Roadshow Series happening on Tuesday, April 21, 2026. The event will provide an opportunity for Royal Gold to engage with investors and analysts. This involvement reflects the company's commitment to transparent communication and investor relations.

data.title: Granite Ridge Resources Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Granite Ridge Resources, Inc. (NYSE: GRNT) is set to release its financial and operating figures for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, May 7, 2026, after the market closes. A webcast and conference call will follow on Friday, May 8, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. CT to delve into these results further. Investors and stakeholders can mark their calendars for this event to gain insight into Granite Ridge's performance in the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: VMD Companies Closes $11.6 Million Sale to Indus at The Campus at Canopy Drive, Completing Second Major Transaction at Middleborough Industrial Park
data.description: A significant milestone has been reached by VMD Companies with back-to-back land sales totaling $18.2 million in Middleborough, Massachusetts. The recent $11.6 million sale of land to Indus, a Braintree-based roadway company, validates VMD's long-term vision for their 700,000 square foot master-planned development. This achievement showcases the successful execution of VMD's strategic plans and emphasizes the attractiveness and potential of the development project.
